nasb.text: Just then there was a man in their synagogue with an unclean spirit; and he cried out,

esv.text: And immediately there was in their synagogue a man with an unclean spirit. And he cried out,

cnv.text: 就在那時，會堂裡有一個被污靈附著的人，喊叫起來，

ccb.text: 当时会堂里有一个被污鬼附身的人喊道：

csbs.text: 忽然，在他们的会堂里，有一个被污灵附身的人喊叫，
